# Let's inspect the files in /mnt/data
import os, json, re, textwrap, sys, unicodedata

os.listdir('/mnt/data')

path = '/mnt/data/file-5TTvCcg3UEUNmd4aLSkSGG-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'rb') as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
# decode as utf-8
s = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
len(s)
print(s[:800])

# find all indices of double quote " U+0022
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(s) if ch == '"']
len(quote_positions), quote_positions[:10]

quote_pairs = list(zip(quote_positions[::2], quote_positions[1::2]))
quote_pairs

segments = []
for startq, endq in quote_pairs:
    seg = s[startq+1:endq]
    context_before = s[max(0, startq-100):startq]
    segments.append((startq, endq, seg, context_before))
segments

positions_ya_ay = [m.start() for m in re.finditer('يَا أَي', s)]
positions_ya_ay[:10]

def extract_until_open_bracket(start_index, s):
    # find first '[' after start_index
    idx = s.find('[', start_index)
    if idx == -1:
        # fallback: until newline or punctuation? We'll take until end or period.
        idx = len(s)
    # The span candidate is s[start_index:idx], then we trim trailing spaces and punctuation per rules.
    span_candidate = s[start_index:idx]
    # Trim trailing spaces and punctuation, quotes, brackets, tatweel from edges
    trim_chars = ' \t\r\n\u200f\u200e"«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ'
    span_candidate = span_candidate.strip(trim_chars)
    # return span and compute new start by searching for this exact substring from start_index-2.. etc?
    # But better to compute the exact start by searching for the span in s starting from a little before start_index
    # We find first occurrence at or after start_index.
    new_start = s.find(span_candidate, start_index-2 if start_index>=2 else start_index)
    new_end = new_start + len(span_candidate)
    assert s[new_start:new_end] == span_candidate
    return new_start, new_end, span_candidate

for pos in positions_ya_ay:
    if pos != 145:  # skip the one inside quotes; we will handle separately to avoid duplicates
        print(pos, s[pos:pos+60])
        start, end, span = extract_until_open_bracket(pos, s)
        print("->", start, end, repr(span[:50]+'...' if len(span)>50 else span))

start1, end1, span1 = extract_until_open_bracket(1986, s)
span1, s[end1:end1+20]

start2, end2, span2 = extract_until_open_bracket(3153, s)
span2, s[end2:end2+20]

# find all starts of "لَيَنْتَهِي" substring
positions_layantahee = [m.start() for m in re.finditer('لَيَنْتَهِي', s)]
positions_layantahee

def extract_hadith_from_position(start_index, s):
    # Determine nearest closing quote or bracket after start index
    idx_quote = s.find('"', start_index)
    idx_bracket = s.find('[', start_index)
    # Candidate end is whichever appears first and is not -1 (if both present choose min positive)
    candidates = [i for i in [idx_quote, idx_bracket] if i != -1]
    if candidates:
        end_index = min(candidates)
    else:
        end_index = len(s)
    span_candidate = s[start_index:end_index]
    # Trim forbidden edge chars
    trim_chars = ' \t\r\n\u200f\u200e"«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ'
    span_trimmed = span_candidate.strip(trim_chars)
    # Now recompute start by finding this exact substring at or near start_index
    # We must ensure we capture the nearest match from at most 2 chars offset.
    search_start = max(0, start_index - 2)
    new_start = s.find(span_trimmed, search_start)
    new_end = new_start + len(span_trimmed)
    assert s[new_start:new_end] == span_trimmed, (span_trimmed[:30], s[new_start:new_end][:30])
    return new_start, new_end, span_trimmed

hadith_spans = []
for pos in positions_layantahee:
    st, en, sp = extract_hadith_from_position(pos, s)
    hadith_spans.append((st, en, sp))
hadith_spans

def trim_and_locate_exact(span_candidate, approximate_start, s):
    trim_chars = ' \t\r\n\u200f\u200e"«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟…ـ'
    trimmed = span_candidate.strip(trim_chars)
    # Now find trimmed around approximate_start - 2..approx+some
    search_start = max(0, approximate_start-2)
    idx = s.find(trimmed, search_start)
    if idx == -1:
        # try global search
        idx = s.find(trimmed)
    if idx == -1:
        raise ValueError("Cannot find the trimmed span")
    end = idx + len(trimmed)
    assert s[idx:end] == trimmed, (idx, end, trimmed, s[idx:end])
    return idx, end, trimmed

# Extract the first ayah inside quotes
first_quote_start, first_quote_end = quote_pairs[0]
ayah1_candidate = s[first_quote_start+1:first_quote_end]
ayah1_start, ayah1_end, ayah1_span = trim_and_locate_exact(ayah1_candidate, first_quote_start+1, s)

ayah1_start, ayah1_end, ayah1_span[:50], ayah1_span[-20:]

citations = []

# Add ayah1
citations.append({
    "span_start": ayah1_start,
    "span_end": ayah1_end,
    "span_text": ayah1_span,
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})

# Add hadith1
hadith1_start, hadith1_end, hadith1_span = hadith_spans[0]
citations.append({
    "span_start": hadith1_start,
    "span_end": hadith1_end,
    "span_text": hadith1_span,
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
})

# Add ayah refs 1 and 2
citations.append({
    "span_start": start1,
    "span_end": end1,
    "span_text": span1,
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})
citations.append({
    "span_start": start2,
    "span_end": end2,
    "span_text": span2,
    "citation_type": "Aya"
})

# Add hadith refs 1 and 2
citations.append({
    "span_start": hadith_spans[1][0],
    "span_end": hadith_spans[1][1],
    "span_text": hadith_spans[1][2],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
})
citations.append({
    "span_start": hadith_spans[2][0],
    "span_end": hadith_spans[2][1],
    "span_text": hadith_spans[2][2],
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth"
})

# Sort by start index
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
citations_sorted

# Verify that s[start:end] equals span_text for each citation, and there are no duplicates (same start,end)
for c in citations_sorted:
    start, end, span = c["span_start"], c["span_end"], c["span_text"]
    assert s[start:end] == span, (start, end, s[start:end], span)

len(citations_sorted)

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":145,"span_end":336,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوبًا وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":594,"span_end":967,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ. إِنّمَا هُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ تَقيّ وَفَاجِرٌ شَقيّ. النّاسُ كُلّهُمْ بَنُو آدَمَ. وآدَمُ خُلِقَ مِنَ تُرَابِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1986,"span_end":2177,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَى وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوباً وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2408,"span_end":2678,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللّهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللّهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالاَبَاءِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":3153,"span_end":3344,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ مِنْ ذَكَرٍ وَأُنْثَى وَجَعَلْنَاكُمْ شُعُوباً وَقَبَائِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوا إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ اللَّهِ أَتْقَاكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":3560,"span_end":3828,"span_text":"لَيَنْتَهِيّنَ أَقْوَامٌ يَفْتَخِرُونَ بِآبَائِهِمْ الّذينَ مَاتُوا إِنّمَا هُمْ فَحْمُ جَهَنّمَ. أَوْ لَيَكُونُنّ أَهْوَنَ عَلَى اللهِ مِنَ الْجُعَلِ الّذِي يُدَهْدِهُ الْخرءَ بِأَنْفِهِ. إِنّ اللهَ قد أَذْهَبَ عَنْكُمْ عُبّيّةَ الْجَاهِلِيّةِ وَفَخْرَهَا بِالَابَاءِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
